Platelets [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
Platelet distribution width [Entitic volume] in Blood by Automated count
Platelet [Entitic mean volume] in Blood by Automated count
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glycemic control, suggestive of prediabetes or early diabetes. Hematocrit is slightly low, which may indicate mild anemia. Platelet distribution width is elevated, possibly reflecting increased platelet size variability, which can be seen in various conditions but may be nonspecific. Other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, and lipid profile, are within normal limits. Clinical correlation and follow-up are recommended.

text.div: Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil
